task: Keep the common-print-form AST parse/serialize structure stable.
notes: Fast structural guard on the baseline AST fixture.

task: Keep the AST JSON roundtrip/build path working on the baseline fixture.
notes: Focused Python-level check for build-form and AST JSON roundtrip.

task: Keep AST-rendered diff behavior working on a modified unpacked fixture.
notes: Focused guard for AST-backed diff rendering.

task: Keep the parse-form/build-form CLI roundtrip stable on common-print-form.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin parse-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.ast.json" && uv run formbin build-form "$tmpdir/form.ast.json" -o "$tmpdir/form.raw" && uv run formbin parse-form "$tmpdir/form.raw" -o "$tmpdir/reparsed.json" && cmp -s "$tmpdir/form.ast.json" "$tmpdir/reparsed.json"'
notes: End-to-end CLI confirmation for parse-form and build-form.

task: Keep the AST diff CLI contract healthy on a changed unpacked baseline fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/left" && cp -R "$tmpdir/left" "$tmpdir/right" && TARGET="$tmpdir/right/records/004-form.raw" python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import os; p=Path(os.environ[\"TARGET\"]); p.write_text(p.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\").replace(\"\\\"Печать\\\"\", \"\\\"Печать2\\\"\", 1), encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\")" && ! uv run formbin diff "$tmpdir/left" "$tmpdir/right" --form-mode ast >/dev/null'
notes: End-to-end CLI guard for AST diff exit behavior on changed inputs.
